title.en: It's a pity that there are no more treasures li...

content.en:
"Don't you dare to do it!"

Ye Tian saw many extreme creatures snooping around, but he didn't dare to approach.

He didn't bother to hunt down these Extreme Dao creatures, and continued to look for resources in Extreme Mang Mountain.

It's a pity that there are no more treasures like the Golden Pole Dao Monument.

In fact, it was already luck to be able to give birth to a Golden Pole Dao Monument, and if it was to breed several such treasures at once, it would be abnormal!

The Pole Monument is gone, but the treasures of this grade of the Pole Monument are not absent.

this day.

Some of the Extreme Creatures found a piece of grass that glowed white, and it was a treasure.

But when the Extreme Creature wanted to take away this grass, the white light entered the body, and the Extreme Creature instantly turned into ashes.

Soon, a lot of extreme creatures gathered here, and Ye Tian also came here, but no one dared to take this grass.

"This is the white grass of the pole, I didn't expect another one to be born!"

The Lord of the Fox Sun was shocked, his face showing longing and urgent need, but he didn't dare to step forward.

Miscanthus white grass?

Many Extreme Creatures are unknown, so I don't know what kind of treasure this is.

At this time, an extreme creature revealed the origin of the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass.

"Before the five Extreme Dao Genius Battles, I discovered the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, which is no less than a good thing like the Golden Extreme Dao Monument, and the value for a single Extreme Dao creature is incomparable, far from being comparable to the Golden Extreme Dao Monument. After all, the Golden Pole Dao Monument is more valuable to a faction, but the Extreme Mango White Grass is a resource that can only benefit a single Extreme Dao creature. "

"Extreme miscanthus white grass is only born in Extreme Mang Mountain, and it contains a trace of light. "

The Pole of Light?

What is the use of a trace of light in the Extreme Dao, many Extreme Dao creatures are puzzled.

The Extreme Dao creature continued to explain: "The Extreme Path of Light I am talking about is not an ordinary Extreme Path of Light, you all know that the Extreme Path is divided into entry, small success, great completion and consummation, but above the perfection, there is also a realm, which is also the realm pursued by many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers Extreme Dao Creatures, that is, the Extreme Extreme Realm! The Extreme Realm transcends the Perfection Realm, but if you want to comprehend an Extreme Path to the Extreme Realm, it is too difficult and almost impossible, and the Extreme Mango White Grass contains a trace of the Extreme Path of Light at the extreme level. For us, this Extreme Miscanthus White Grass has no value, we can't even touch it, where is the qualification to refine. But for those who are high up in the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, the value of the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass is very high, and they are definitely willing to spend a huge price to acquire it. "

"One Extreme Mango White Grass is not enough for them to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Light at the extreme level, right?"

Extreme creatures questioned.

"Hahaha, one Extreme Miscanthus White Grass is indeed not enough, but what if it happens? A treasure like the Golden Extreme Dao Monument is no longer of much value to that kind of existence, but the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass is valuable, so they are willing to pay more treasures to buy it. It's a pity that I don't have time to take this white grass. The Extreme Creature laughed.

At this time, the Lord of the Fox Sun looked at Ye Tian's location, "The Endless Lord of the End of the World, you are here, why don't you try to pick the Extreme Mango White Grass?"

Other Extreme Dao creatures also looked at Ye Tian one after another, very vigilant, and had the idea of escaping at any time.

Of course, they also hoped that Ye Tian would pick the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, and then be bombarded and killed by the Extreme Light Extreme Dao of the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass.

Even if it is a trace of the extreme light of the extreme, it is not something that a super-perfect controller can compete with.

......

No Road Tower.

Ye Tian was consulting the Lord of Canggu.

"Lord of the Ancients, I saw the Extreme Mangbai Grass in Jimang Mountain!"

Ye Tian said.

"Extreme Mangsangbai Grass!" "The Ancient Lord was taken aback, "This is a good thing, although I am not contemplating the Extreme Path of Light, but I also want it! Extreme Miscanthus White Grass is absolutely an unimaginable treasure for the Extreme Realm Perfect Masters who have comprehended the Extreme Path of Light, and they are even willing to fight hard! Unfortunately, you can't take the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass at the moment, with the cultivation of your super perfect controller, at least you need to comprehend the Extreme Path of Light at the peak of Dacheng before you can touch the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass." "

"The Extreme Dao of Light at the peak of Dacheng?"

Ye Tian shook his head, he couldn't do it at the moment, and he didn't have much time to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Light.

After all, it won't be too long before Jimang Mountain will be closed again.

"Lord of Canggu, is there still a way to take away the Extreme Mangbai Grass?"

Ye Tian asked again.

He sensed the power of the Extreme Mangbai Grass, and his strength was indeed very strong, but he definitely couldn't bear the power of the Extreme Mang, after all, the power of the Extreme Mangs could hurt him, not to mention the extreme light of the Extreme Mangs White Grass.

The Lord of Canggu pondered for a moment, and then said, "Then there is only one way left, to create an Extreme Path Secret Technique, which can prevent you from being bombarded by the Extreme Mangbai Grass." But this is too difficult, even if he asks the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm who has comprehended the Extreme Dao of Light to go to the Extreme Mangshan, it will be difficult for him to create such a secret technique in such a short period of time! And he must understand the power of the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass before he can create it, how can he create it if he can't touch it?"

"Lord of the Ancients, I understand, thank you for your guidance!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Endless Lord, give up, but before you give up, you can destroy the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, otherwise, in the next session, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace will definitely cultivate an Extreme Dao creature, so that it can inherit and learn the secret technique of collecting the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass. Of course, if you want to learn that kind of secret art, the requirements are very high, and it is not so easy to cultivate. The secret techniques involving the Extreme Path cannot be taught in many cases, and can only be practiced by a single living being. But after all, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace had obtained the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, and their understanding of the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass far surpassed ours. We can't collect the Miscanthus Grass, but they can. "The Lord of the Ancients.

If you can't get it, you will destroy it, this is the idea of the end of the world.

Although a single Extreme Mango White Grass has a very low hope of allowing a Extreme Realm Perfect Controller to comprehend the Extreme Light Extreme Path, if it is really comprehended, then the strength of the Extreme Path Deep Sea will increase.

This is a scene that the end of the world does not want to see!

Therefore, the Lord of the Ancient Heavens hoped that Ye Tian would destroy the Extreme Mangbai Grass.

......

"I have the hope to create the secret technique of collecting the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, but I don't have time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Time is a problem, there is not enough time for him to create.

Even if he lifted the Polar Dao Monument of Time and Space now, chose to copy the Extreme Mangsang, and then experimented with the copy body again and again, it would take a long time to copy the Extreme Mangsang, and at that time, the Extreme Mangshan Mountain would have been closed long ago.

He didn't want to wait until the next Extreme Dao Genius Battle began, when he would definitely step into the Void Realm Perfect Controller.

So.

"Let's destroy it!"

Ye Tian decided.

Destroying the Polar Miscanthus White Grass was only a loss of a resource for him.

His original intention was to take the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass and trade with the Extreme Realm Perfect Master, but if it was gone, it would be gone.

In the future, he can copy the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass anyway, and he still hopes to use the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass to participate in enlightenment and cultivation, and comprehend the extreme path of extreme light in the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass.

With a decision in his heart, Ye Tian no longer hesitated.

Immediately, he came to the Extreme Mangbai Grass and directly attacked the Extreme Mangbai Grass.

"Stop!"

The Lord of the Fox Sun and other Extreme Dao creatures were furious and wanted to stop Ye Tian, but when they thought that Ye Tian could withstand the power of the Extreme Mang and not die, if they took the initiative to attack Ye Tian, then they would be finished, because they couldn't stop it!

As a result, these Extreme Creatures just shouted, and no Extreme Creatures really did it.

Under the gaze of many Extreme Dao creatures, Ye Tian's attack fell on the Extreme Mangbai Grass.

Although the Extreme Light Extreme Dao power of the Extreme Mangbai Grass shattered Ye Tian's attack, a part of the power still fell on the Extreme Mangbai Grass, causing the Extreme Mangwhite Grass to shatter.

In this way, the treasure of the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass was destroyed.
